claims.text: Flowcean is a framework designed to automate the generation of models through data-driven learning.
claims.source_quote: we present Flowcean, a novel framework designed to automate the generation of models through data-driven learning that focuses on modularity and usability.

claims.text: Flowcean focuses on modularity and usability as core design principles.
claims.source_quote: we present Flowcean, a novel framework designed to automate the generation of models through data-driven learning that focuses on modularity and usability.

claims.text: Flowcean offers various learning strategies, data processing methods, and evaluation metrics.
claims.source_quote: By offering various learning strategies, data processing methods, and evaluation metrics, our framework provides a comprehensive solution, tailored to CPS scenarios.

claims.text: Flowcean is tailored to Cyber-Physical Systems scenarios.
claims.source_quote: our framework provides a comprehensive solution, tailored to CPS scenarios.

claims.text: Flowcean facilitates the integration of diverse learning libraries and tools within a modular and flexible architecture.
claims.source_quote: Flowcean facilitates the integration of diverse learning libraries and tools within a modular and flexible architecture, ensuring adaptability to a wide range of modeling tasks.

claims.text: Constructing models for Cyber-Physical Systems is difficult and time-consuming due to the inherent complexity of CPS.
claims.source_quote: Constructing such models is difficult and time-consuming due to the inherent complexity of CPS.

claims.text: Data-driven model generation using machine learning methods is gaining popularity for Cyber-Physical Systems.
claims.source_quote: As a result, data-driven model generation using machine learning methods is gaining popularity.

claims.text: Effective models of Cyber-Physical Systems are crucial for their design and operation.
claims.source_quote: Effective models of Cyber-Physical Systems (CPS) are crucial for their design and operation.

claims.text: Flowcean streamlines the process of model generation and evaluation.
claims.source_quote: This streamlines the process of model generation and evaluation, making it more efficient and accessible.
